stem: The population of bald eagles in a wildlife refuge can be modeled by the function R, where R(t) is the population t years after 2000. Which is the best interpretation of the equation R(15) = 320?

answerOptions.content: The bald eagle population is predicted to be 15 in the year 2015.
The bald eagle population is predicted to be 320 in the year 2020.
The bald eagle population is predicted to be 320 in the year 2015.
The bald eagle population is predicted to be 15 in the year 2320.

rationale:
Choice C is correct. Because t is the number of years after 2000, t = 15 corresponds to the year 2015, and R(15) = 320 means the predicted population is 320 in 2015.

Choices A and D reverse the meaning of t and R(t). Choice B uses the wrong year.
